bearer_token.description: TickTick OAuth access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <token>). Never logged. Takes precedence over client_access_token and access_token when more than one is configured.

client_access_token.description: Fallback TickTick OAuth access token, used only when bearer_token is not configured. Sent as a Bearer token. Never logged. Takes precedence over access_token when both are configured.

access_token.description: Fallback TickTick OAuth access token, used only when neither bearer_token nor client_access_token is configured. Sent as a Bearer token. Never logged.

base_url.description: TickTick Open API base URL override for tests or proxies.

project_id.description: TickTick project id the 'tasks' stream reads (GET /project/{project_id}/data). Required for the 'tasks' stream.
